title: Mythical Monsters
description: Adds 5 new mobs, each with unique drops or uses.
body:
***Requires the [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) mod to run.***

- Slyvester the Cyclops
  - Has a low chance to spawn in Plains biomes or can be summoned with the Cyclopes Lure
  - Has a groundpound attack that deals huge damage is a wide area
  - Drops the Sylvester's Horn item used to craft the Cyclops Scimitar
- Omnipotent Celestial
  - Spawns on the End Islands (not the one where you fight the Ender Dragon)
  - Has a long ranged attack that deals huge in a small area
  - Summons smaller, weaker eyes that will attack you after the Omnipotent Celestial is hit 3 times
  - Drops the Eye of Omnipotence which highlights all mobs in massive area while held
  - The Eye of Omnipotence can also be used to craft the Mask of Omnipotence, which does the same thing as the Eye of Omnipotence but must be worn to work.
- Gerald the Goblin
  - Found in caves below y-level 50
  - Every 5 minutes drops items from a set loot pool-> Iron Ingot, Skeleton Skull, Gold, Emerald, Amethyst Shard, Diamond, Golden Apple (Least to most rarity)
  - Will only drop items when tamed with a Gold Ingot
  - When tamed Gerald the Goblin will not follow you, however you can use leads on him
- The Grim Reaper
  - Summoned with the new Withered Cross item
  - The Grim Reaper has an attack that spawns a skull that will fly towards you and on impact it will explode, it can be killed before it reaches or if it takes to long to reach you it will die
  - The Grim Reaper has a second attack that sends a wave dealing massive damage towards you, move out of the way to avoid damage.
  - The Grim Reaper's third attack will teleport the Grim Reaper to the nearest player and then create an explosion, keep moving and you should be able to dodge the attack.
  - The Grim Reaper has a chance to their scythe which inflicts the wither effect onto whatever you strike
  - The Grim Reaper also drops 12-16 Grim Cloth which is used to craft the Grim Reaper armour set.
  - When wearing the entire Grim Reaper armour set when you kill an entity you gain strength  for 8 seconds, heal, and gain hunger.
- Blood Cultist
  - Summoned by hitting an entity with the Sacrificial Knife
  - Has a passive ability for when the Blood Cultist is below 40% health where they gain strength and speed, there will be a visible change telling you when they are in this phase
  - Has an ability that causes the Blood Cultist to deal damage to themself in turn giving them strength II and speed II however it is only temporary. (The Blood Cultist will only do this while above 40% health)
  - The Blood Cultist has a move that leaves behind a damaging pool of blood, the pool becomes stronger when the Blood Cultist is below 40% health. (Again there will be a visible difference to be able to tell how damaging the pools are)
  - Drops the Mask of Masochism which while worn if the wearer falls below 60% health they gain strength and speed and at 20% health the wearer gains strength II and speed II


***Requires the [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) mod to run.***
